chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-71 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on statement. 17.01.2018. Learned Counsel for the applicants vide his statement dated 12.01.2018 available on record does not press this bail application, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
